subject: docs(claude): add HTTPS proxy pattern to Suggested Implementations
body:
Node.js fetch() and https.get() do not respect HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY
env vars. Documents the zero-dependency HTTP CONNECT tunnel pattern
used in geocode-all.mjs as a reusable recipe for all projects running
in proxy-only environments (CI containers, Claude Code remote, etc.).

Also adds proxy-only network note to AI Notes section.

Tags: documentation, networking, proxy, infrastructure
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: data-extraction
Semver: patch

title: add HTTPS proxy pattern to Suggested Implementations
